name: writing-audit
description: Use to AUDIT an EXISTING piece of writing — tighten wordy prose at the line and paragraph level (revise), fix mechanics, grammar, and consistency while preserving voice (copyedit), or diagnose why a draft drags, buries the point, or fails to land (diagnose). Triggers on 'tighten this', 'copyedit this', 'why does this drag', 'review my draft', 'this memo buries the point'.

inspired_by.name: Revising Prose
inspired_by.author: Richard Lanham
inspired_by.contribution: The paramedic-style pass — find buried actions under to-be verbs and nominalizations, collapse preposition strings, report a before/after tightening ratio.

inspired_by.name: On Writing Well
inspired_by.author: William Zinsser
inspired_by.contribution: The clutter taxonomy at the line level — qualifiers, throat-clearing windups, redundancy, euphemism.

inspired_by.name: The Sense of Style
inspired_by.author: Steven Pinker
inspired_by.contribution: The curse-of-knowledge scan against a target reader; given-before-new coherence.

inspired_by.name: Dreyer's English
inspired_by.author: Benjamin Dreyer
inspired_by.contribution: Mechanics and consistency, the wan-intensifier ban, the writer's pet-word tics, and real rules versus superstitions.

inspired_by.name: The Pyramid Principle
inspired_by.author: Barbara Minto
inspired_by.contribution: The answer-first and MECE diagnostic — flag a buried recommendation and non-exclusive, non-exhaustive groups.

inspired_by.name: Writing Software Documentation: A Task-Oriented Approach
inspired_by.author: Thomas Barker
inspired_by.contribution: The task-completeness diagnostic — flag feature-tour structure, fused steps, and orphaned procedures.

inspired_by.name: The Story Grid
inspired_by.author: Shawn Coyne
inspired_by.contribution: The editor's test — does this section turn? — and the five-part section check for a flat draft.

inspired_by.name: Poetics
inspired_by.author: Aristotle
inspired_by.contribution: The causal-necessity and reversal-recognition test that distinguishes a narrative from an episodic recap (public domain).

inspired_by.name: Story
inspired_by.author: Robert McKee
inspired_by.contribution: The missing-turning-point flag — a section where no value flips can be cut or merged.

inspired_by.name: Made to Stick
inspired_by.author: Chip Heath & Dan Heath
inspired_by.contribution: The stickiness scan and curse-of-knowledge check for a pitch or explainer that doesn't land.

inspired_by.name: Building a StoryBrand
inspired_by.author: Donald Miller
inspired_by.contribution: The org-centric versus audience-as-hero flag and the few-second stranger (grunt) test.

metadata.catalog_summary: Audit an existing piece of writing — revise wordy prose, copyedit mechanics while preserving voice, or diagnose why a draft buries the point or fails to land — routed by intent (revise/copyedit/diagnose) × genre, emitting a scored findings report.
